search_queries_used: European guideline chronic pruritus 2025 history clinical examination exact section
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic laboratory panel, imaging, medicine, or referral plan
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: All investigations and management remain clinician-selected and clinician-entered.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Primarily adults with chronic itch and no obvious primary rash; acute, pediatric, pregnancy, older-person, systemic, neurologic, psychiatric, medicine, and renal or hepatic contexts need qualified review.
setting_applicability: UAE primary, dermatology, and multidisciplinary assessment.
UAE_applicability: The assessment framework is transferable, but UAE epidemiology, laboratory reference, medicine, specialty, and referral pathways remain local.
recency_verification: The current primary 2025 European guideline was reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The 2025 European guideline is the current reviewed version.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact chronic-pruritus assessment section supports documenting itch without a primary rash, onset, duration, severity and impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, concerns, whole-skin and distribution examination, mucosal context, general appearance and previous records without assigning a cause.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting onset, duration, localisation, generalisation, time course, intensity, triggers, associated symptoms, medicines, exposures, personal and family history, whole skin, scalp, nails, oral and anogenital examination, and primary versus secondary lesions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact work-up framework supports documenting laboratory or pathology results already available; it does not generate tests.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports recording laboratory or other results already available and clinician-selected investigation context according to history and examination; it does not generate a test panel.

unresolved_source_gaps: Acute versus chronic classification, exact location and timing, nocturnal pattern, triggers, medicines, systemic review, pregnancy, examination findings, laboratory values, diagnosis, tests, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
